title: pelargonium × schizophyllum
intro: Pelargonium × schizophyllum, also known as the Cape Geranium or Leonotis, is a hybrid plant species in the family Geraniaceae, derived from the cross between Pelargonium capitatum and Leonotis leonurus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × schizophyllum include its ability to alleviate symptoms of coughs and colds, soothe digestive issues, and even help manage stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
